CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed, the Court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk EBura; Proceedings not reported. (610)
